flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Longwood University rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($21.8k → $25.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Longwood University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (61.6% vs 66.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Longwood University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
